rationale: QA Engineer with 4.2 years at CRED and Pied Piper (fictional company flag), Physics B.Sc from tier_3 institution, skills are Illustrator/PostgreSQL/AWS with only surface-level Prompt Engineering and no embeddings, retrieval, or ranking experience.

Data Analyst whose entire career spans Capgemini (IT services) and Dunder Mifflin (fictional company), with data-engineering/analytics focus; despite Weaviate and Semantic Search skills listed, there is no evidence of production IR or ranking ownership and honeypot signals are present.

Career is entirely non-technical - Sales Executive, Marketing Manager, and HR Manager at Wipro, Wayne Enterprises (fictional), and Stark Industries (fictional) - with zero engineering or ML work at any stage.

Data Engineer with 7.7 years at real product companies (PhonePe, Dream11, Ola) demonstrating strong backend/data engineering, but skills and descriptions are SQL-warehouse and Spark-heavy with no embeddings, vector search, or ranking systems experience; domain is wrong for this role.

Only 1.6 years of experience as a .NET/frontend developer at Zomato with self-learner AI exposure only (online courses, small RAG side project), too junior and wrong technical domain for a senior AI engineer role despite a PhD credential from a tier_3 institution.

Graphic Designer at Wipro (IT services) whose summary explicitly describes a marketing manager background and whose actual work was enterprise sales; skills list includes Reinforcement Learning but no production ML work is evidenced anywhere in the profile.

Software Engineer with 7.9 years split across Dunder Mifflin (fictional), Zomato, and Mphasis (IT services) in backend/QA roles; skills are in Object Detection, Forecasting, and Speech Recognition - wrong ML domain - with no IR, retrieval, or ranking production work.

DevOps Engineer with 2.9 years entirely at Tech Mahindra (IT services) focused on AWS/Terraform/Kubernetes infrastructure; Information Retrieval appears as an advanced skill but the entire career shows cloud/DevOps work with no production ML or ranking systems evidence.

IIT Kanpur + CMU-educated ML engineer with BM25 (advanced) and Pinecone (intermediate) skills and verifiable production recommendation/ranking work at Saarthi.ai startup, though current title is Computer Vision Engineer and one stint is at HCL (IT services), creating a mixed IR+CV profile.

Stanford MS AI (tier_1) is a strong education signal but only 2.9 years as a full-stack/mobile developer at Mindtree (IT services) and Flipkart with web-stack skills and purely self-learner AI exposure; no production IR, embeddings, or ranking experience despite the elite pedigree.
